title: quota: Quota/get to display storage usage
description:
Implement JMAP Quota support (urn:ietf:params:jmap:quotas):
- Detect quotas capability in session
- Quota/get: returns Quota objects with dataTypes [Message, Chat, Space], used, hardLimit, warnLimit, scope
- Expose via JmapChatClient::get_quota() -> Vec<Quota>
- Callers: display storage bar in UI; warn when used > warnLimit
- Test: fixture-based get_quota() returning Message and Chat quotas

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/quota_get.json
close_reason: Implemented JmapRequestBuilder, call_batch, ResultReference, Session::supports_refplus/quotas, Quota type, quota_get(); all tests pass
